character.name: A woman in her 40s,
character.prompt: A woman in her 40s, tan skin, tied-back graying dark blonde hair. Wears sturdy dark gray overalls over a faded green long-sleeve shirt, with a brown leather technician's harness across the chest holding three small labeled toolkit pouches. Cracked amber-lensed goggles hang around her neck. Weathered brown gloves and boots. Carries a boxy handheld gray device with a small green screen showing a checkmark icon. Confident, tired, capable expression, arms often crossed. Slightly stocky, grounded build.
